name: flowlink
description: Compliance-first payments for the agent economy on HashKey Chain (id 133). Markdown is the API.

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: Create an invoice with a stable invoice_id. See /skills/invoice.md.

tools.name: get_invoice
tools.description: Fetch an invoice by id. See /skills/invoice.md.

tools.name: pay_invoice
tools.description: Settle an invoice via HSP Single-Pay mandate with inline OFAC screening. See /skills/pay.md.

tools.name: check_sanctions
tools.description: OFAC + velocity screen a wallet address. Fails closed on upstream error. See /skills/compliance.md.

tools.name: get_receipt
tools.description: Fetch an ed25519-signed receipt for a settled transaction. See /skills/receipt.md.

tools.name: get_reputation
tools.description: Query the counterparty reputation score for a wallet address. See /skills/reputation.md.

tools.name: list_api_keys
tools.description: List minted API keys for the local admin user (sanitized — no raw key, no hash). Dev-only. See /skills/admin.md.

tools.name: mint_api_key
tools.description: Create a fresh scoped API key. The raw key is returned ONCE — persist immediately. Dev-only. See /skills/admin.md.

tools.name: revoke_api_key
tools.description: Revoke a previously minted API key by id. Idempotent. Dev-only. See /skills/admin.md.

tools.name: query_observability
tools.description: Rolling /v1/* traffic summary: top fingerprints, latency p50/p95, status mix. Dev-only. See /skills/dashboard.md.
